name: Grilled Mustard & Pepper-Crusted Steaks
recipeIngredient: Salt and hot pepper sauce to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the wine, oil, shallots, garlic, 2 teaspoons of the mustard, Worcestershire sauce, half a teaspoon of the peppercorns, thyme, and salt in a blender or food processor. Mix well. Transfer to a glass baking dish and add the steaks, turning several times to ensure they are well coated. Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or overnight, turning several times.
2. Prepare a medium-hot charcoal fire. Combine the remaining mustard and hot pepper sauce in a small dish.
3. Remove the steaks from the marinade; pat them dry. Spread a thin layer of mustard mixture over one side of each steak and add some of the remaining pepper. Place on the grill, mustard-side down. Brush the remaining mustard over and sprinkle with pepper. Grill, about 8 inches from the coals, turning once, until cooked to desired doneness (8 to 12 minutes total for medium-rare).
